Cocktail Bar

RESERVATIONS
PRIVATE BAR ROOM
We offer limited reservations and primarily operate on a first come, first served
basis with seats available for walk-ins.
Paid valet parking is available Wednesday - Saturday from 4pm - 11pm.
Our entrance is on Fogg Street behind The Bill Voorhees Building.
Sixteen years, countless cocktails, and one unforgettable legacy later - The Patterson House has begun its next chapter perched atop The Bill Voorhees Building on the fifth floor of 700 8th Ave S. Since 2009, we’ve helped shape Nashville’s cocktail culture, earning nods from
Bon Appétit
and the James Beard Foundation along the way. Now, as the city grows, so do we - with a fresh space, new surprises, and the same commitment to the craft that’s kept us shaking, stirring, and pouring for over a decade.
MAKE A RESERVATION
HOURS
7 DAYS A WEEK, 4PM - 2AM
LOCATION
THE BILL VOORHEES BUILDING
700 8TH AVENUE SOUTH, FIFTH FLOOR, NASHVILLE, TN, 37203
CONTACT
INFO@THEPATTERSONNASHVILLE.COM
615-810-8200
We welcome limited reservations and encourage walk-ins.
Paid valet parking is available Wednesday - Saturday from 4pm - 11pm.
Our entrance is on Fogg Street behind The Bill Voorhees Building.

--- Page: /menu ---
Menu | Experience Nashville’s Best Cocktails – Reserve Today — The Patterson House
0
Since its inception, The Patterson House has set the standard for craft cocktails in Nashville with its pre-Prohibition style cocktail list of more than 1,200 different drinks using quality ingredients, meticulous technique and house-cut ice tailored precisely to each glass. The cocktail program, known for its balance of tradition and innovation, continues to anchor the experience with the move to the new location allowing for a significant increase in offerings.
The new iteration of The Patterson House brings a more ambitious approach to its culinary offerings leveraging the talent and proximity of neighboring restaurant, The Catbird Seat.
Short Menu
Food Menu
Long Menu
The Short Menu
Our Short Menu is a look forward, a more modern menu featuring eight frequently changing original cocktails.
Short Menu
The Long Menu
Our Long Menu honors The Patterson House classics with 150 rotating selections organized into 12 thoughtful categories.
Long Menu
The Food Menu
Our Food Menu, led by Chef Matt Atkinson, features a robust selection of dishes that could serve as a snack or a full meal, all complementing the bar’s spirit-driven focus.
Food Menu

--- Page: /privateevents ---
Private Bar Room | Book Your Event Today — The Patterson House
0
PRIVATE EVENTS
PRIVATE BAR ROOM
The Patterson House features a Private Bar Room with the ability to host events for up to 40 standing or 16 seated guests. We offer both private cocktail receptions and private dining options in this space.
STANDING ROOM COCKTAIL RECEPTION
We offer standing room events where socializing is the purpose of the occasion, and the bar is the centerpiece. Seating is limited in this format with some lounge seating, and up to four bar seats upon request. A private bartender is provided and pre-ordered food options are available.
CAPACITY
20 Guests is Spacious  |  32 Guests is Full
40 Guests is Crowded  |  50 Guests is Maximum
BEVERAGE
The Private Bar has its own cocktail menu that can be adjusted with notice to meet the palates and preferences of your guests. Most cocktails are priced at $16 + associated taxes, however for premium cocktails, prices may increase. Spirits are priced as listed on spirit menus.
PRIVATE DINNER IN THE BAR ROOM
We offer a family-style dinner coming from the combined kitchens of The Patterson House and The Catbird Seat for up to 16 guests.
The Bar Room offers the perfect opportunity to dine with your guests in an intimate private space for occasions where your group exceeds our capacities in the dining room.
Available : Monday - Sunday, 3-Hour Maximum
BEVERAGE
Standard Wine Pairing - $100pp
Reserve Wine Pairing - $140pp
Bottles for the Table
| Pre-Selected bottles from our wine list to be served to the table.
PBR Cocktail Bar Menu
| Order off our Private Bar Room Cocktail Menu which does include wine by the glass and beer options
CAPACITY
Minimum of 8 Guests For a Seated Dinner
Maximum of 16 Guests For a Seated Dinner
EVENT INQUIRY
FOOD
Food from The Patterson House food menu may be pre-ordered and served in the bar room. If food is not pre-ordered, we may be unable to accommodate food requests. Given the nature of the space, standing-room reception food options are limited; however your event manager can help explore available possibilities.
FOOD
Dinners in The Private Bar Room will be served as a seated multi-course family-style dinner. There are a couple packages to choose from, and all options will be based on seasonal ingredients, current restaurant menus, and the chef’s inspiration.
PRIVATE EVENTS
